attributes.description: The name of the textarea, submitted as a name/value pair with form data.
attributes.name: name

attributes.description: The current value of the textarea, submitted as a name/value pair with form data.
attributes.name: value

attributes.description: The textarea's size.
attributes.name: size

attributes.description: The textarea's label. If you need to display HTML, use the `label` slot instead.
attributes.name: label

attributes.description: The textarea's help text. If you need to display HTML, use the `help-text` slot instead.
attributes.name: help-text

attributes.description: Placeholder text to show as a hint when the input is empty.
attributes.name: placeholder

attributes.description: The number of rows to display by default.
attributes.name: rows

attributes.description: Controls how the textarea can be resized.
attributes.name: resize

attributes.description: Disables the textarea.
attributes.name: disabled

attributes.description: Makes the textarea readonly.
attributes.name: readonly

attributes.description:
By default, form controls are associated with the nearest containing `<form>` element. This attribute allows you
to place the form control outside of a form and associate it with the form that has this `id`. The form must be in
the same document or shadow root for this to work.
attributes.name: form

attributes.description: Makes the textarea a required field.
attributes.name: required

attributes.description: The minimum length of input that will be considered valid.
attributes.name: minlength

attributes.description: The maximum length of input that will be considered valid.
attributes.name: maxlength

attributes.description: Controls whether and how text input is automatically capitalized as it is entered by the user.
attributes.name: autocapitalize

attributes.description: Indicates whether the browser's autocorrect feature is on or off.
attributes.name: autocorrect

attributes.description:
Specifies what permission the browser has to provide assistance in filling out form field values. Refer to
[this page on MDN](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Attributes/autocomplete) for available values.
attributes.name: autocomplete

attributes.description: Indicates that the input should receive focus on page load.
attributes.name: autofocus

attributes.description: Used to customize the label or icon of the Enter key on virtual keyboards.
attributes.name: enterkeyhint

attributes.description: Enables spell checking on the textarea.
attributes.name: spellcheck

attributes.description:
Tells the browser what type of data will be entered by the user, allowing it to display the appropriate virtual
keyboard on supportive devices.
attributes.name: inputmode

cssParts.description: The form control that wraps the label, input, and help text.
cssParts.name: form-control

events.description: Emitted when the control loses focus.
events.name: syn-blur

events.description: Emitted when an alteration to the control's value is committed by the user.
events.name: syn-change

events.description: Emitted when the control gains focus.
events.name: syn-focus

events.description: Emitted when the control receives input.
events.name: syn-input

events.description: Emitted when the form control has been checked for validity and its constraints aren't satisfied.
events.name: syn-invalid

methods.description: Selects all the text in the textarea.
methods.name: select

methods.description: Gets or sets the textarea's scroll position.
methods.name: scrollPosition

methods.description: Sets the start and end positions of the text selection (0-based).
methods.name: setSelectionRange

methods.description: Replaces a range of text with a new string.
methods.name: setRangeText

methods.description: Checks for validity but does not show a validation message. Returns `true` when valid and `false` when invalid.
methods.name: checkValidity

methods.description: Gets the associated form, if one exists.
methods.name: getForm

methods.description: Checks for validity and shows the browser's validation message if the control is invalid.
methods.name: reportValidity

methods.description: Sets a custom validation message. Pass an empty string to restore validity.
methods.name: setCustomValidity

properties.description: The name of the textarea, submitted as a name/value pair with form data.
properties.name: name

properties.description: The current value of the textarea, submitted as a name/value pair with form data.
properties.name: value

properties.description: The textarea's size.
properties.name: size

properties.description: The textarea's label. If you need to display HTML, use the `label` slot instead.
properties.name: label

properties.description: The textarea's help text. If you need to display HTML, use the `help-text` slot instead.
properties.name: helpText

properties.description: Placeholder text to show as a hint when the input is empty.
properties.name: placeholder

properties.description: The number of rows to display by default.
properties.name: rows

properties.description: Controls how the textarea can be resized.
properties.name: resize

properties.description: Disables the textarea.
properties.name: disabled

properties.description: Makes the textarea readonly.
properties.name: readonly

properties.description:
By default, form controls are associated with the nearest containing `<form>` element. This attribute allows you
to place the form control outside of a form and associate it with the form that has this `id`. The form must be in
the same document or shadow root for this to work.
properties.name: form

properties.description: Makes the textarea a required field.
properties.name: required

properties.description: The minimum length of input that will be considered valid.
properties.name: minlength

properties.description: The maximum length of input that will be considered valid.
properties.name: maxlength

properties.description: Controls whether and how text input is automatically capitalized as it is entered by the user.
properties.name: autocapitalize

properties.description: Indicates whether the browser's autocorrect feature is on or off.
properties.name: autocorrect

properties.description:
Specifies what permission the browser has to provide assistance in filling out form field values. Refer to
[this page on MDN](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Attributes/autocomplete) for available values.
properties.name: autocomplete

properties.description: Indicates that the input should receive focus on page load.
properties.name: autofocus

properties.description: Used to customize the label or icon of the Enter key on virtual keyboards.
properties.name: enterkeyhint

properties.description: Enables spell checking on the textarea.
properties.name: spellcheck

properties.description:
Tells the browser what type of data will be entered by the user, allowing it to display the appropriate virtual
keyboard on supportive devices.
properties.name: inputmode

properties.description: The default value of the form control. Primarily used for resetting the form control.
properties.name: defaultValue

properties.description: Gets the validity state object
properties.name: validity

properties.description: Gets the validation message
properties.name: validationMessage

slots.description: The textarea's label. Alternatively, you can use the `label` attribute.
slots.name: label

slots.description: Text that describes how to use the input. Alternatively, you can use the `help-text` attribute.
slots.name: help-text

summary: Textareas collect data from the user and allow multiple lines of text.
